modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty accessing Google Sheets.

full_description_text: The user was trying to open Google Sheets. They couldn't find the right link or access point. This happened during a call with the help desk. They seemed a bit confused about where to go.
description: The user was trying to open Google Sheets. They couldn't find the right link or access point. This happened during a call with the help desk. They seemed a bit confused about where to go.
